title: festuca elatior var. arundinacea
intro: Festuca elatior var. arundinacea, also known as tall fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Festuca elatior var. arundinacea include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to address various health issues.
